## 📝 Description

Brief description of what this PR does. Explain the problem it solves or the feature it adds.

## 🎯 Type of Change

- [ ] **New Feature** (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] **Bug Fix** (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] **Breaking Change** (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] **Documentation Update** (changes to README, docs, comments)

## 🔍 Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)

Related to #(issue number)

## 🧪 Testing

Describe the testing you performed:

- [ ] Tested on hardware (specify boards below)
- [ ] Unit tests pass: `pio test -e native`
- [ ] Build passes: `pio run -e <environment>`
- [ ] No compiler warnings
- [ ] Verified sensor readings (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested edge cases

### Hardware Tested

- [ ] Arduino Uno
- [ ] ESP32
- [ ] Other: _____________

### Sensor/Output Verification

If your changes affect hardware I/O, include:
- Sensor readings or output samples
- Pin configurations used
- Power consumption (if relevant)
- Performance metrics (if relevant)

**Example:**
```
DHT11 Sensor - Temperature readings verified:
- 20°C - ✓ Accurate
- 30°C - ✓ Accurate
- High humidity - ✓ No interference
```

## 📋 Checklist

Before submitting this PR:

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have updated documentation where needed
- [ ] I have removed debug prints and temporary code
- [ ] I have added comments for complex logic
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] No leftover merge conflicts
- [ ] Commit messages are semantic and descriptive
- [ ] I have requested review from at least 1 team member
- [ ] Branch name follows convention: `feature/`, `bugfix/`, `hotfix/`

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs (if applicable)

Include terminal output, sensor readings, or any relevant screenshots:

```
[Paste relevant build/test output here]
```

## 🚀 Performance Impact

- [ ] No significant memory increase
- [ ] Build size unchanged
- [ ] No performance degradation
